summary: Iteration 3 testing of KIEMA long-form upgrade (per-scene reference images + master/global style ref). Backend: 18/18 pytest passed including new scene-object validation, 422 on legacy string format, immediate-delete after create, light GET payload with has_reference flag, list endpoint without scenes field. Frontend: all new data-testids verified — global-style-upload/clear, scene-ref-upload/thumb/clear-{i}, manual-add-scene, plus AI plan flow working end-to-end via Claude. No Sora renders were triggered (all created jobs deleted immediately).

issues: Hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — likely from a <select> renderer somewhere in the tree. Not affecting functionality but should be cleaned up.

Spec called for total=24s but the UI 'custom-length-min' input has min=1 minute (60s), so the smallest selectable target via UI is 60s — produces 8 scenes at clip=8s instead of the 3 mentioned in the request. API itself accepts 24s; this is a UI-only constraint mismatch with the test spec.

action_items: Optional: lower UI minimum custom length to allow sub-1-min totals (e.g. seconds-level granularity) if you want UI to match the 24s test case in the spec.
Optional: fix the React hydration warning about <span> inside <option>.
No critical fixes required — feature works as designed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew past 700 lines (~736). Worth splitting into modules (longform/, auth/, studio/).

_process_longform_job is fired via asyncio.create_task right after insert; a delete arriving milliseconds later can still race with the worker which already called find_one. In testing nothing leaked but production should consider a small 'queued' guard before invoking Sora (re-check existence after status update).

POST /api/longform/create accepts and stores style_reference_image_b64 in Mongo as full base64 — for large images this bloats job docs significantly. Consider storing only the derived Claude style description (or hashing to a blob store).
Frontend reads file as data URL and splits on ','; works for typical images but the b64 part is sent to API uncompressed and uncapped — add a client-side size cap (e.g. 2MB) to avoid huge payloads.
test_credentials: Session token seeded via mongosh: test_session_1782472405805 (user test-user-1782472405805). Per /app/auth_testing.md.
seed_data_creation: 1 test user + session in test_database. No long-form jobs leaked (all immediately deleted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file (/app/backend/tests/test_longform_api.py) is reusable as regression for long-form. Set KIEMA_SESSION_TOKEN env to a freshly seeded session_token (mongosh script in /app/auth_testing.md). Tiny 1x1 PNG b64 constant TINY_PNG_B64 reusable. Frontend testids of note: global-style-upload/clear, scene-ref-upload-{i}, scene-ref-thumb-{i}, scene-ref-clear-{i}, scene-{i}, manual-add-scene, plan-button, start-render-button. NEVER click start-render-button without immediate cleanup — would trigger paid Sora 2 renders.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues found. Minor design notes documented under design_issues / critical_code_review_comments.
